source: Claude gap analysis 2026-06-11 (Track C) + PI.md Phase 9
title: Minimal web chat UI served by the brain server
current_state: No browser access to Pi at all.
target_state: GET / on the brain server serves one self-contained index.html (vanilla JS, no build step, no framework): conversation list sidebar, message pane, input box, SSE token streaming, mode badge. Token pasted once into localStorage. Dark, fast, boring — a tool, not a product.
migration_plan: 2. Static mount in app/server.py; same bearer token via query/header.
3. Markdown rendering client-side (marked.js from CDN is acceptable; degrade to <pre>).
4. Tests: server-side only — static route serves, auth enforced on API not on /.
risk_notes: Localhost-only inherits T-187's boundary. Resist feature creep: no accounts, no settings page, no themes.
